rag_rules: Generate assume/guarantee clauses only for visible AADL features or eq/const helpers declared in the same annex.
Place assume/guarantee/eq/const in component type annexes when expressing interface behavior; use assign in implementation annexes for implementation bindings.
generic_rules: Use only identifiers explicitly available as ports, constants, or declared helpers in the AGREE annex scope.
Ensure expression types align with AADL data types: use bool for Boolean comparisons, int/real for numeric ranges.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: assume "label": expression; guarantee "label": expression; eq name : type = expression; const name : type = value;
Wrap all AGREE content in annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-only names in component type contracts.
